debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
i j : ι
hij : i ≤ j
⊢ eLpNorm (X i) 2 P ≤ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P

have hsq := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have hle :
      ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P :=
    hsq.lintegral_le_of_le hij
  have hi_meas : AEStronglyMeasurable (X i) P :=
    ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)).aestronglyMeasurable
  have hj_meas : AEStronglyMeasurable (X j) P :=
    ((hX.martingale.adapted j).mono (𝓕.le j)).aestronglyMeasurable
  have hi_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) P := hX.integrable_sq i
  have hj_int : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) P := hX.integrable_sq j
  simpa [eLpNorm, ENNReal.ofReal_rpow, hi_meas, hj_meas, hi_int.2, hj_int.2] using
    ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow hle (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (2 : ℝ)))

simpa [eLpNorm] using
    (hX.martingale.eLpNorm_mono (p := 2) (by norm_num) hij)

have hsub : Submartingale (fun k ω ↦ ‖X k ω‖ ^ 2) 𝓕 P := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have hle : ∫ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P ≤ ∫ ω, ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P :=
    hsub.integral_mono hij
      (hX.integrable_sq i) (hX.integrable_sq j)
  simpa [eLpNorm, ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal] using
    ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow hle (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ))

classical
  have hsub : Submartingale (fun k ω ↦ ‖X k ω‖ ^ 2) 𝓕 P :=
    hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have hle : ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω‖ ^ (2 : ℝ) ∂P :=
    hsub.lintegral_le_of_le hij
  simpa [eLpNorm, ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow_iff, (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < (2 : ℝ)),
    ENNReal.ofReal_rpow_of_nonneg, (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (2 : ℝ)))] using
    (ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow hle (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (2 : ℝ))))
